projectDescription: A browser-based tool that converts any image into a color-coded alpha pattern matrix, ready for crafts, cross-stitch, pixel art, and design use.
keyFeatures: Upload images via drag-and-drop or file picker (JPG, PNG, WEBP)
Configurable grid matrix (columns × rows) with aspect ratio lock
Color similarity threshold to merge near-duplicate palette colors
Alpha/opacity threshold to ignore semi-transparent edge pixels
Interactive canvas preview with pan and zoom
Pencil tool for manual cell editing with full undo/redo history
Color palette legend with symbol labels (A–Z, AA–ZZ, …)
Export to PNG, Excel (.xlsx), Excel with color (.xls), CSV, Google Sheets (.xlsx), and HTML with color
Web Worker offloading keeps the UI responsive during heavy pixel processing
Fully client-side — no server required, no data leaves the browser
publicApiSurface: processImage(img, cols, rows, options) → { colorMatrix, paletteMap, symbolMatrix }
processImageAsync(img, cols, rows, options) → Promise<{ colorMatrix, paletteMap, symbolMatrix }>
ImageProvider — React context provider for global app state
useImage() — React hook exposing imageState, patternConfig, patternData, generatePattern, editOverlay, undo, redo, undoAll, redoAll
